content:
# Session 10 → next-plan recommendations

## CRITICAL (must address before any more SNAP prover work)

1. **`sectionsMul_mul_comm` is FALSE for the current signature — STOP assigning it as a prover task.**
   Triple-confirmed (prover + lean-auditor + lean-vs-blueprint-checker). The section ring is the free
   tensor algebra on `Γ(L)`; commutativity requires `L` invertible (`β_{L,L}=𝟙`). This is a SIGNATURE
   problem, not a proof problem — escalated to the user (TO_USER.md + `informal/sectionsMul_mul_comm.md`).
   - **Plan agent action:** this is a strategy fork the user owns. Options to surface:
     (a) add an invertibility/line-bundle hypothesis to `sectionsMul_mul_comm` AND the downstream
     `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` (then comm closes from the PROVEN `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`
     + residue `β_{L,L}=𝟙`); or
     (b) downgrade the general-`L` structure to a non-commutative graded `GSemiring` and reserve
     `GCommSemiring` for the line-bundle case.
   - `archon-protected.yaml` freezes nothing, so a signature edit needs no protected override — but the
     direction is the mathematician's call. Do NOT have a prover guess; wait for a USER_HINTS.md steer or
     pick (a)/(b) explicitly in the plan sidecar as a "Decision made".
   - **Blueprint already flagged** with `% NOTE:` on `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm`, `lem:sectionMul_coherent`,
     `lem:sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`. Whichever option is chosen, dispatch a blueprint-writer to
     rewrite the `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm` statement+sketch (current sketch is mathematically wrong) and
     correct the `\lean{}` signatures BEFORE re-dispatching a prover (HARD GATE).

## Closest-to-completion / promising (TRUE, genuinely closable)

2. **`tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` (NEW partial, ~L2389)** — the assoc analogue of the PROVEN
   `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`, but a `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`-scale build (NOT one-step): the
   rewired `tensorObjAssoc` is the bridge-conjugated canonical `α_`, not `sheafification.mapIso` of one
   morphism. Route in body: presheaf-morphism identity via `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` +
   `PresheafOfModules.associator_hom_app`, then evaluate at `⊤`. **Effort-break candidate** — dispatch
   effort-breaker on this node (and on `tensorPowAdd_assoc`) before the next prover lane; the one-step
   braiding template does NOT transfer, so a thin "same as braiding" sketch (current blueprint) will
   waste a lane. The blueprint proof sketch was `% NOTE:`-flagged as misleading; have a blueprint-writer
   rewrite it as the multi-lemma construction.

3. **`sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (~L2526)** — TRUE for arbitrary `L`. 3 ingredients: (1) item 2 above;
   (2) `μ`-naturality of `sectionsMul` under whiskering (build as an η-naturality-under-whiskering lemma);
   (3) iso-level pentagon `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (induction mirroring `tensorPowAdd`'s recursion with
   `MonoidalCategory.pentagon` as the canonical core — analogue of `canonical_runit_core`). Only assign a
   prover after ingredients (1)–(3) are decomposed into named blueprint atoms (effort-breaker).

## Reusable patterns discovered

4. **Section-level structural-iso naturality split by iso shape.** A `Γ(structural-iso) ∘ sectionsMul`
   identity is ONE-STEP (`rfl` + `congrArg .trans`, the `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul` template) IFF the
   iso is `sheafification.mapIso` of a single presheaf morphism (unitors, braiding). For the ASSOCIATOR
   (bridge-conjugated canonical `α_` post iter-008 rewire) the one-step fails — it needs the multi-lemma
   strong-monoidality construction. Classify the iso before picking the template.

5. **`hβ`/`rfl` + type ascription.** Presheaf braiding / unitor at `op ⊤` on a tensor element closes by
   bare `rfl` once the target element is given an explicit `(tensorObj_p …).obj(op⊤)` type ascription;
   then finish with `key.trans (congrArg <map>.hom hβ)`, NOT `rw [hβ] at key` (un-beta-reduced redex).

## Do NOT retry
- `sectionsMul_mul_comm` under the current signature (see item 1) — no `sorryAx`-free proof exists.
- The `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` one-step braiding template (`rfl` / `dsimp; rfl` /
  `simp only [tensorObjAssoc, sectionsMul, Iso.trans_hom]`) — all three tried and failed this iter.

## Deferred / out-of-cone (unchanged)
- χ leg (`QuotScheme.lean`, 4 sorries): cohomology engine absent; fill at merge.
- Blueprint-doctor broken refs in Cohomology_FlatBaseChange / Picard_QuotScheme / Picard_GlueDescent:
  extraction artifacts, resolve at merge (do not edit — byte-identical-to-parent).
- Coverage debt: `archon dag-query unmatched` = 0 (clean this iter).
